mapper.select: SELECT id, customer_id, status, street, city, postal_code, country, created_at, updated_at, version FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (id, customer_id, status, street, city, postal_code, country, created_at, updated_at, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{customerId}, #{status}, #{deliveryAddress.street}, #{deliveryAddress.city}, #{deliveryAddress.postalCode}, #{deliveryAddress.country}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{version})
